View My Work

Who I Am

A nurturing presence
behind every child's growth.

I am a dedicated, compassionate, and highly dependable early childhood professional with hands-on experience supporting children aged 3–6 in both classroom and transportation settings. I am passionate about creating safe, engaging, and inclusive environments where every child feels valued, supported, and inspired to learn. My ability to communicate effectively, remain calm under pressure, and build meaningful relationships with children, parents, and colleagues has enabled me to make a positive impact wherever I serve. I studied Procurement & Logistics at KCA University, strengthening my organisational, planning, and problem-solving abilities. I combine professionalism, patience, empathy, and a strong work ethic to deliver exceptional care and support, and I am committed to continuous growth while contributing positively to every organisation I join.

dettess137@gmail.com

Career Journey

Experience

Oct 2024 –
Jun 2026
Teacher Assistant
SABIS International School Runda
  • Assisted lead kindergarten teachers in delivering structured, play-based learning activities for children aged 3-6 years following the SABIS early years framework.
  • Supported daily classroom routines including circle time, storytelling, phonics, numeracy basics, arts & crafts, and guided play.
  • Contributed to creating a safe, structured, and nurturing learning environment, aligned with school behavior and safeguarding standards.
  • Supervised children during indoor and outdoor activities, ensuring safety, inclusion, and positive behavior management.
  • Provided individual support to learners with varying development needs, reinforcing early literacy, numeracy, and social skills.
  • Assisted in preparing teaching materials, classroom displays, and learning resources to enhance engagement and visual learning.
  • Maintained consistent communication with lead teachers regarding student progress, behavior, and classroom needs.
  • Supported classroom organization, hygiene routines, and transition management to ensure smooth daily operations.
Feb 2024 –
Oct 2024
Bus Assistant
SABIS International School Runda
  • Assisted children in safely boarding and exiting the school bus.
  • Monitored student behaviour and enforced transportation rules.
  • Helped younger children with seat belts and seating arrangements.
  • Maintained accurate attendance records during transportation.
  • Communicated effectively with drivers, school staff and parents regarding student needs.
